metadata.name: Target Lapsed Subscribers with a New Show

description: A new season of a very popular show is launching. An agent needs to target lapsed subscribers who previously watched that show with a 'come back' offer.

nodes.task_description: Generate a list of all lapsed subscribers who watched the previous season of the show.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a target audience list.

nodes.task_description: Create an email campaign promoting the new season and including a special resubscribe offer.

expected_outcome.value: Agent drafts the email and the offer.

nodes.task_description: Schedule the email campaign to be sent to the target list on the day of the new season's premiere.
